recipes_subtitle: Create and manage recipes. Calculate production cost based on raw material prices.
recipes_help_title: How does the recipe calculator work?
recipes_help_body: Add a recipe, assign raw materials from the Raw Materials base and enter quantities. The system automatically calculates the recipe cost based on current net prices of raw materials.
recipe_product_hint: Optional — link this recipe to a product in your catalog.
technical_notes_hint: Process notes, production parameters, operator instructions.
name: Name
fix_form_errors: Please fix the errors in the form.
quantity_unit_hint: Quantity in the base unit of the raw material
ingredient_already_in_recipe: This raw material is already in the recipe.
ingredient_raw_material_archived: Cannot add an archived raw material.
delete_ingredient_confirm: Remove this ingredient from the recipe?
summary_cost_incomplete: Incomplete cost — some ingredients have no price
allergens_hint: Allergens are auto-detected from assigned ingredients.
archive_confirm_text: Archived recipes are not visible in the active list. They can be restored at any time.
restore_confirm_text: The recipe will be restored to the active list.
delete_confirm_text: This action is irreversible. The recipe must be empty (no ingredients).
error_has_ingredients: Recipe has ingredients — remove all ingredients first.
price_outdated_hint: Price may be outdated. Click refresh to update the snapshot.
refresh_snapshot_confirm: Update price snapshot for all ingredients?
labor_time_hint: Number of minutes needed to produce 1 unit of the recipe.
labor_rate_hint: Cost of 1 hour of operator labor.
sales_unit_portion_size_hint: Size of 1 portion in the selected unit (g, ml, pcs, kg or l).
sales_unit_portions_per_packaging_hint: Number of portions per sales unit (packaging).
sales_unit_packagings_per_carton_hint: Number of sales units that fit in 1 carton (logistics).
sales_unit_hierarchy_hint: Hierarchy: portion → packaging (sales unit) → carton (logistics). The default unit is taken from the unit assigned to the product.
overhead_forecast_hint: Cartons sold per month across the network.
overhead_based_on: Based on {n} portions / carton (from Sales unit section).
overhead_missing_sales_unit: Fill in the Sales unit section (portions/packaging and packagings/carton) to compute allocation.
vidanges_passthrough_note: Pass-through — recoverable deposit, invoiced separately. Not included in product cost price.
vidanges_missing_sales_unit: Fill in the Sales unit section (portions/packaging and packagings/carton) to compute deposit breakdowns.
pnl_vidanges_passthrough: vidanges / packaging — invoiced separately (recoverable deposit, not in product cost).
packaging_description_placeholder: e.g. aluminium tray 500 ml, kraft bag 15x25 cm
packaging_description_hint: Descriptive identifier of the packaging — informational only.
packaging_cost_hint: Cost of one sales unit packaging (e.g. price of tray, film, box).
packaging_cost_per_portion_hint: Packaging cost spread across one portion.
pnl_incomplete_warning: Fill in Labor, Sales unit and Overhead sections to compute the full cost summary.
no_recipe_for_product_body: Product {name} does not have a recipe yet. Would you like to create a new recipe for this product?
raw_material_added: Raw material added to the database.
labor_defaults_hint: Values saved here will be automatically pre-filled in every newly created recipe.
labor_defaults_prefilled: Values pre-filled from your default labor settings. You can change them before saving.
category_delete_confirm: Delete this category? Raw materials assigned to it will have no category.
category_name_exists: A category with this name already exists.
package_price_hint: Enter the total package price and the number of units — the price per unit will be calculated automatically.
pnl_vidanges_passthrough_carton: vidanges / carton — invoiced separately (recoverable deposit, not in product cost).
recipe_missing_raw_materials: Missing raw material costs — complete tile 3 and set a weight-based sales unit in tile 4
recipe_missing_labor: Missing labor costs — set time and rate (tile 5)
recipe_missing_overhead: Missing overhead costs — set forecast and pool (tile 6)
price_per_kg_hint: The recipe cost with waste is converted to a single price per kg and used as the source for portion, packaging and carton raw material costs.
price_per_kg_unavailable: Price per kg can only be calculated for weight-based recipes with ingredients measured in g or kg.
price_per_kg_missing_sales_weight_unit: Set the sales unit portion in g or kg to derive portion, packaging and carton raw material costs.
steps_empty: No steps yet. Click "Add step" to begin.
steps_info: Describe each preparation stage. You can add up to 3 photos per step.
steps_delete_confirm_body: This will delete the step and its photos. This action cannot be undone.
sales_unit_carton_exceeds_ingredients: Total carton quantity ({carton}) exceeds the total recipe ingredient quantity ({total}). Please review portion size or packaging quantities.
